nodes.recentposition: Business Analyst Intern at Cisco in San Jose, CA
nodes.involvements: MAISS, UCI Division of Continuing Education
nodes.bios: Hi!! My name is Megha Bhargava and I initiated in my fall quarter of my first year at UCI. In my free time I love to read, watch and analyze movies, and browse pinterest for my next obsession. A fun fact about myself is that my dream job was to be a fashion designer when I was younger. Ask me about my book recs at recruitment!
